name: How do I prove my occupational disease came from work when there's no single incident, like in Idaho?

mainEntity.name: How do I prove my occupational disease came from work when there's no single incident, like in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use medical evidence, exposure records, and expert opinion to show work causation by preponderance.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Prove by preponderance that the disease arose out of and in the course of employment, showing work environment caused it.[2] For Idaho, it must be peculiar to your job, not common public hazards.[2] Key factors: Medical expert testimony; exposure logs; rule out non-work causes.[2] Collect coworker statements, job descriptions, and testing results. File with Idaho Industrial Commission and consider legal help for fact-finding.

description: Use medical evidence, exposure records, and expert opinion to show work causation by preponderance.[2]
